to acquire, to gain for oneself, Gen 12:5 31:18 .

Derivative, רְכוּשּׁ.

II.

רכש

an unused root [joined with the preceding in Thes.], i.q. Arab. ركض (שׁ and צ being interchanged), to run quickly (as a horse), gallopiren רַעַשׁ (of a horse leaping, Job 39:20, 24 Job 39:24). Hence-
